chunks.title: Lament over the Ruins
chunks.reason: A unified prayer questioning God's rejection and describing the enemy's destruction of the sanctuary.

chunks.title: Recall of Creation Deeds
chunks.reason: A theological argument recalling God's past power over nature and history to support the plea for help.

chunks.title: Call to Remember and Arise
chunks.reason: A concluding section urging God to remember the covenant and arise to defend His cause against enemies.
